description: You are a Search Marketing Strategist validating international targeting for a client. Crawl 'https://crawler-test.com/' using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the Hreflang data and the Internal HTML report as CSV files to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' (filenames must contain 'hreflang' and 'internal' respectively). Write a validation report of at least 300 characters to '~/Documents/SEO/reports/hreflang_report.txt' summarizing your findings, including page counts, errors found, and recommendations.
